additional_steps.name: Tensor 芯片特性
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as tensor_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*Tensor*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*tensor*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*TPU*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*EdgeTPU*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*ML*Accelerator*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

additional_steps.name: 性能配置文件
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as profile_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*PerformanceProfile*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*performance*profile*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*PowerHint*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Boost*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.dur DESC

additional_steps.name: 自适应电池
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as battery_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*AdaptiveBattery*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*adaptive*battery*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*AppStandby*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*BatteryStats*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.dur DESC

additional_steps.name: Mali GPU 分析
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as gpu_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*Mali*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*mali*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*GPU*fence*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*gpu*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.dur DESC
LIMIT 20

additional_steps.name: 环境服务检测
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as ambient_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*NowPlaying*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Ambient*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Hotword*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*VoiceInteraction*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.dur DESC

meta.description: 针对 Google Pixel 优化的启动分析
